title: Zeroblob truncated by an index on an expression
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(id INT PRIMARY KEY, data BLOB, info TEXT DEFAULT 'default');
CREATE INDEX t2data_info ON t2(data, info);
INSERT INTO t2(id, data, info) VALUES(1, CAST(zeroblob(16) AS BLOB), 'test');
INSERT INTO t2(id, data, info) VALUES(2, CAST(zeroblob(0) AS BLOB), NULL);
SELECT id, data, LENGTH(data), info FROM t2;
key_bug_features: Inserting zeroblob into indexed column truncates data
